mnemonics: 3 Friends Order Pizza (3-Point), Find It By Number (Fibonacci)
keyPoints: 3-Point Search divides the interval into three equal parts and discards the worst section based on function evaluation.
Fibonacci Search uses Fibonacci numbers to optimally reduce the interval size, minimizing the number of function evaluations required.
Both methods are used for finding the minimum of a unimodal function on a closed interval without using derivatives.
commonMistakes: Applying the method to a non-unimodal function, which can lead to convergence on a local minimum instead of the global one.
Confusing the reduction formulas or Fibonacci number sequence, leading to incorrect interval updates.
